items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Launches Health in ChatGPT for Personalized Insights
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Health，連結健康數據給個人化洞察
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI announced Health in ChatGPT is rolling out to U.S. users. Eligible users can securely connect Apple Health and supported medical records so ChatGPT can provide contextual insights, track changes, and support more informed conversations. Connected data is not used to train foundation models.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 Health in ChatGPT 開始向美國用戶推出。符合條件的用戶可安全連接 Apple Health 與支援的醫療紀錄，讓 ChatGPT 提供情境化洞察、追蹤變化並支援更知情的對話。連接資料不用於訓練基礎模型。
items_flat.analysis_en: This moves ChatGPT deeper into personal health management, potentially changing how users interact with medical data daily. Key uncertainty remains long-term privacy trust and regulatory scrutiny around AI health advice.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此舉使 ChatGPT 更深入個人健康管理，可能改變用戶日常與醫療資料的互動方式。關鍵不確定性在於長期隱私信任，以及 AI 健康建議的監管審查。
items_flat.quote: Health in ChatGPT is launching to U.S. users. You can choose to securely connect Apple Health and supported medical records so ChatGPT can help you understand your information in context, keep track of what has changed, and have more informed, personalized conversations.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「ChatGPT Health 正開始向美國用戶推出。您可選擇安全連接 Apple Health 與支援的醫療紀錄，讓 ChatGPT 幫助您在情境中理解資訊、追蹤變化，並進行更知情、個人化的對話。」

items_flat.title_en: ChatGPT Voice Arrives on Desktop with GPT-Live Multi-Agent Control
items_flat.title_zh: ChatGPT 語音功能上線桌面版，支援 GPT-Live 多代理人控制
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out ChatGPT Voice to the desktop app on macOS and Windows. Powered by GPT-Live, users can control their computer and direct multiple agents in ChatGPT Work or Codex using only voice, speaking, listening and coordinating simultaneously. Rolling out to Plus, Pro, Business, Edu and Enterprise plans.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Voice 推出至 macOS 與 Windows 桌面應用。由 GPT-Live 驅動，用戶可僅用語音控制電腦，並指揮 ChatGPT Work 或 Codex 中的多個代理人，同時說話、聆聽與協調。向 Plus、Pro、Business、Edu 與 Enterprise 方案推出。
items_flat.analysis_en: Desktop voice with real computer control and multi-agent orchestration marks a practical leap toward hands-free agentic workflows. Adoption and reliability outside controlled demos remain to be proven at scale.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 桌面語音結合真實電腦控制與多代理人協作，是朝向免提代理人工作流程的實用躍進。大規模採用與受控示範外的可靠性仍待驗證。
items_flat.quote: ChatGPT Voice is now in the desktop app. Control your computer and direct multiple agents running in ChatGPT Work or Codex, using just your voice. It's powered by GPT-Live, so it can speak, listen, and coordinate work in the app at the same time.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「ChatGPT Voice 現已在桌面應用中。僅用語音即可控制電腦，並指揮 ChatGPT Work 或 Codex 中運行的多個代理人。由 GPT-Live 驅動，可同時說話、聆聽並協調應用中的工作。」

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Upgrades Claude Voice Mode with Opus/Sonnet and Tool Use
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 升級 Claude 語音模式，支援 Opus/Sonnet 與工具使用
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic updated Claude Voice Mode so it now runs on Claude Opus, Sonnet and Haiku, can reach connected tools like Gmail and Slack mid-conversation, and supports more languages. Available in beta to all users on mobile, desktop and web.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 更新 Claude 語音模式，現可運行於 Claude Opus、Sonnet 與 Haiku，能在對話中途使用已連接的工具（如 Gmail、Slack），並支援更多語言。公開 beta 向所有用戶在行動、桌面與網頁提供。
items_flat.analysis_en: Bringing frontier models into voice with live tool use makes spoken problem-solving far more capable, closing the gap between casual chat and productive work. Success hinges on latency, accuracy of tool calls, and user trust in spoken actions.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 將前沿模型導入語音並支援即時工具使用，使口語問題解決能力大幅提升，縮小休閒聊天與高效工作之間的差距。成功關鍵在於延遲、工具呼叫準確性，以及用戶對語音行動的信任。
items_flat.quote: Voice mode now runs on Claude's more capable models and reaches the tools you've connected mid-conversation. Talk through the hard problems out loud, in many more languages.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「語音模式現在運行於 Claude 更強大的模型，並可在對話中途使用您已連接的工具。用更多語言大聲討論困難問題。」

items_flat.title_en: xAI Introduces Workflows in Grok Build for Parallel Agent Orchestration
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 在 Grok Build 推出 Workflows，支援平行代理人協作
items_flat.summary_en: xAI announced Workflows in Grok Build. Users describe a complex task in plain language; Grok plans it, fans it out across up to 1,024 parallel agents in the background, verifies results, and returns a single report. Workflows can be saved and reused.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 宣布 Grok Build 推出 Workflows。用戶以普通語言描述複雜任務；Grok 規劃後，背景並行啟動最多 1,024 個代理人，驗證結果並回傳單一報告。工作流程可儲存並重複使用。
items_flat.analysis_en: Parallel multi-agent orchestration at this scale advances practical agentic coding and research tools beyond single-thread chat. Real-world reliability and cost of large agent budgets will determine whether it becomes everyday infrastructure.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此規模的平行多代理人協作，將實用代理人編碼與研究工具推進到超越單線程聊天的層級。真實世界可靠性與大型代理人預算成本，將決定它是否成為日常基礎設施。
items_flat.quote: Grok Build can now write and run workflows: orchestration scripts that fan a task out across hundreds of parallel agents, verify the results, and report back in one background run.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「Grok Build 現在可以撰寫並執行 workflows：編排腳本，將任務分散至數百個平行代理人，驗證結果，並在一次背景執行中回報。」

items_flat.title_en: Google Releases First ATLAS Report on Real-World AI Usage
items_flat.title_zh: Google 發布首份 ATLAS 報告，分析真實世界 AI 使用情況
items_flat.summary_en: Google published the first AI & Economy ATLAS report, analyzing 15 million de-identified interactions from Gemini products used by over 1 billion people monthly. Findings show AI use is broad across occupations but shallow (mostly assistance for ~21% of tasks in typical jobs), with most interactions outside work.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google 發布首份 AI & Economy ATLAS 報告，分析來自每月超過 10 億人使用的 Gemini 產品的 1,500 萬筆去識別化互動。發現顯示 AI 使用廣泛覆蓋各職業但程度淺（典型工作中約僅 21% 任務使用，多為協助），多數互動發生於工作以外。
items_flat.analysis_en: Large-scale empirical data on actual AI adoption provides a needed baseline beyond hype or surveys. It underscores that transformative automation is still limited, informing policy and product priorities with real usage patterns.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 大規模真實 AI 採用的實證資料，提供超越炒作或調查的必要基準。它凸顯轉型性自動化仍有限，並以真實使用模式為政策與產品優先順序提供依據。
items_flat.quote: AI use at work is broad but shallow: Workplace adoption spans all industry sectors and also 68% of all occupations that collectively represent 90% of total U.S. employment. However within jobs, people are using AI selectively: in a typical job AI is used for only ~21% of tasks.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「工作中的 AI 使用廣泛但程度淺：職場採用橫跨所有產業，以及合計佔美國就業 90% 的 68% 職業。然而在工作內部，人們選擇性使用 AI：典型工作中 AI 僅用於約 21% 的任務。」

google.title_en: Google Releases First ATLAS Report on Real-World AI Usage
google.title_zh: Google 發布首份 ATLAS 報告，分析真實世界 AI 使用情況
google.summary_en: Google published the first AI & Economy ATLAS report, analyzing 15 million de-identified interactions from Gemini products used by over 1 billion people monthly. Findings show AI use is broad across occupations but shallow (mostly assistance for ~21% of tasks in typical jobs), with most interactions outside work.
google.summary_zh: Google 發布首份 AI & Economy ATLAS 報告，分析來自每月超過 10 億人使用的 Gemini 產品的 1,500 萬筆去識別化互動。發現顯示 AI 使用廣泛覆蓋各職業但程度淺（典型工作中約僅 21% 任務使用，多為協助），多數互動發生於工作以外。
google.analysis_en: Large-scale empirical data on actual AI adoption provides a needed baseline beyond hype or surveys. It underscores that transformative automation is still limited, informing policy and product priorities with real usage patterns.
google.analysis_zh: 大規模真實 AI 採用的實證資料，提供超越炒作或調查的必要基準。它凸顯轉型性自動化仍有限，並以真實使用模式為政策與產品優先順序提供依據。
google.quote: AI use at work is broad but shallow: Workplace adoption spans all industry sectors and also 68% of all occupations that collectively represent 90% of total U.S. employment. However within jobs, people are using AI selectively: in a typical job AI is used for only ~21% of tasks.
google.quote_zh: 「工作中的 AI 使用廣泛但程度淺：職場採用橫跨所有產業，以及合計佔美國就業 90% 的 68% 職業。然而在工作內部，人們選擇性使用 AI：典型工作中 AI 僅用於約 21% 的任務。」

xai.title_en: xAI Introduces Workflows in Grok Build for Parallel Agent Orchestration
xai.title_zh: xAI 在 Grok Build 推出 Workflows，支援平行代理人協作
xai.summary_en: xAI announced Workflows in Grok Build. Users describe a complex task in plain language; Grok plans it, fans it out across up to 1,024 parallel agents in the background, verifies results, and returns a single report. Workflows can be saved and reused.
xai.summary_zh: xAI 宣布 Grok Build 推出 Workflows。用戶以普通語言描述複雜任務；Grok 規劃後，背景並行啟動最多 1,024 個代理人，驗證結果並回傳單一報告。工作流程可儲存並重複使用。
xai.analysis_en: Parallel multi-agent orchestration at this scale advances practical agentic coding and research tools beyond single-thread chat. Real-world reliability and cost of large agent budgets will determine whether it becomes everyday infrastructure.
xai.analysis_zh: 此規模的平行多代理人協作，將實用代理人編碼與研究工具推進到超越單線程聊天的層級。真實世界可靠性與大型代理人預算成本，將決定它是否成為日常基礎設施。
xai.quote: Grok Build can now write and run workflows: orchestration scripts that fan a task out across hundreds of parallel agents, verify the results, and report back in one background run.
xai.quote_zh: 「Grok Build 現在可以撰寫並執行 workflows：編排腳本，將任務分散至數百個平行代理人，驗證結果，並在一次背景執行中回報。」

brief_en: OpenAI rolled out Health in ChatGPT for U.S. users and desktop Voice powered by GPT-Live for multi-agent computer control. Anthropic upgraded Claude Voice Mode to Opus/Sonnet with tool use. xAI launched Workflows in Grok Build supporting up to 1,024 parallel agents. Google published its first ATLAS report on real-world AI usage from 15 million Gemini interactions.
brief_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Health（美國用戶）與桌面語音多代理人控制；Anthropic 升級 Claude 語音至 Opus/Sonnet 並支援工具；xAI 在 Grok Build 推出最高 1,024 平行代理人的 Workflows；Google 發布首份 ATLAS 報告，解析 1,500 萬筆真實 AI 使用。
